'''''Star Wars: Rebellion: Vector''''' is the fourth and final arc in the [[Star Wars: Rebellion (comic series)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] series of comics. It is the third part of the cross-over arc ''[[Star Wars: Vector]]''.
